description_long: This is a single-story suburban house surrounded by lush green trees and shrubbery, set on a rectangular plot with a driveway and a small front yard. The house features a flat roof and a brick exterior, with large windows on the front and sides allowing ample natural light into the interior. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, with distinct living, bedroom, and bathroom areas. The front facade is characterized by a simple entryway, flanked by greenery and a paved walkway leading to the main door. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the house is bordered by a well-maintained lawn. The overall design is practical and modest, typical of mid-20th-century ranch-style homes.
description: A single-story brick house with a flat roof, surrounded by trees and a driveway, featuring large windows and a simple entryway. The layout is open and practical, with a well-kept lawn and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and dense greenery flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, driveway, and the arrangement of rooms visible through the open roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with more windows, a grassy backyard, and additional trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side windows, and the continuation of the brick facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a paved walkway, no porch or columns, flanked by dense shrubbery and trees.
